items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued investment in protecting Australian organisations and is worth watching for any new compliance expectations. Separately, Scamwatch is warning Australians about food delivery scams and unhealthy online relationships — both tactics used to steal personal or financial information.

Phishing attack volumes have dropped globally, but experts warn the attacks that do occur are more targeted and harder to spot. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message — whether a food delivery offer, a romantic contact, or a workplace request — pause before clicking any links or sharing personal details.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, setting national defense priorities.
